name: Olayan Financing Company
lpActivityNotes: No confirmed LP-in-VC-fund evidence found in public sources.
directInvestNotes: Invested in CloudPay Series G ($120M round) Aug 2024; backed Pure Harvest Smart Farms $180.5M growth round Jun 2022; invested in Breadfast $50M pre-Series C Feb 2026.

name: JIMCO (Jameel Investment Management Company)
lpActivityNotes: JIMCO Technology Fund ($500M evergreen) invests in select global VC funds alongside direct deals; LP in funds targeting MENA fintech.
directInvestNotes: Direct investments include Tabby (BNPL, Series A & B), Lean Technologies (API fintech, seed), Rain (crypto exchange Bahrain, Series A $6M), Starship Technologies (Series C $50M robotics), Commonwealth Fusion Systems Series B $1.8B (2021).

name: Kingdom Holding Company
lpActivityNotes: No sub-$100M VC fund LP evidence found; participates in large-cap rounds.
directInvestNotes: Invested $400M in xAI Series B (May 2024) and additional $400M in xAI Series C (Dec 2024); total $800M in Elon Musk's AI startup. Prior direct bets include Lyft and Careem.

name: Man Capital
lpActivityNotes: No confirmed LP-in-VC-fund evidence found.
directInvestNotes: Direct investments include FreightMango (logistics SaaS, undisclosed round), Oceanscan (Oct 2024, marine survey tech). Averages ~2 deals/year across logistics, healthcare, renewable energy, and tech globally.

name: AlRajhi Partners
lpActivityNotes: No LP-in-sub-$100M-VC-fund evidence confirmed.
directInvestNotes: Invested in Soum $18M Series A (Dec 2023, secondhand marketplace); participated in Invygo $8M Series A extension (Oct 2024, car subscription). Founded 2019 by subset of Al Rajhi banking family.

name: MASIC (Mohammed Ibrahim Alsubeaei & Sons Investment)
lpActivityNotes: LP strategy explicitly targets US VC emerging managers (Fund I-III); prefers funds <=$150M. Commits $20M-$150M tickets to first and second-time fund managers. Expanding to healthcare and fintech specialisation.
directInvestNotes: No confirmed direct startup investments in MENA found.

name: SEDCO Holding
lpActivityNotes: SEDCO invests as LP in local and international VC and PE funds targeting IT, logistics, and infrastructure (per 2024 annual review). Confirmed indirect allocation to VC/PE fund managers.
directInvestNotes: No confirmed named direct startup investments.

name: Al Faisaliah Group
lpActivityNotes: Anchor LP in Nuwa Capital Fund I (~$100M target, 2021 first close at $75M); strategic investor and partner helping portfolio cos enter Saudi market. Fund covers seed to Series B in MENA/Turkey/Pakistan.
directInvestNotes: No confirmed direct startup investments in press.

name: KBW Ventures
lpActivityNotes: No LP-in-sub-$100M-VC-fund evidence found; operates own CVC platform.
directInvestNotes: Portfolio of 64 companies including unicorns Bird, Carta, Square (IPO). CIO Ekta Tolani joined early 2024 shifting focus to AI-driven businesses and growth equity. Sector focus: food tech, AI, blockchain, fintech.

name: Al Rajhi Family Office
lpActivityNotes: No confirmed LP-in-VC-fund evidence found.
directInvestNotes: Led seed round in Calo (food subscription app) Seed VC-II Dec 2022. Family of AbdulAziz Al Rajhi, distinct from AlRajhi Partners and Tamasuk Al Rajhi.

name: Tamasuk Al Rajhi
lpActivityNotes: No confirmed LP-in-sub-$100M-VC-fund evidence; invests directly.
directInvestNotes: Focuses on fintech, AI, industrial, and mobility sectors per public profile. Established just before COVID-19 by Abdulaziz and Saud Al Rajhi (sons of Sheikh Saleh Abdulaziz Al Rajhi).

name: Alajlan Family Office
lpActivityNotes: No confirmed LP-in-VC-fund evidence; deploys directly.
directInvestNotes: 11 portfolio companies including Robinhood (NASDAQ IPO), Coursera (NYSE IPO), Plaid, Sila Nanotechnologies. Primary focus pre-seed/seed in B2B SaaS, future of work, PropTech, EduTech, developer tools. Founded 2022.

name: Waad Investment
lpActivityNotes: GCC family offices coalition fund; SAR 750M ($200M) target for growth-stage startups. AlMajed (Almajdiah Group) and AlMisfer (BINYAH/Saudi Real Estate Infrastructure) are named co-anchors. Additional unnamed Gulf FO LPs.
directInvestNotes: 23 portfolio companies listed on website including CanGo (smart cane), fintech and AI cos. Founded 2024.

name: CE-Ventures (Crescent Enterprises)
lpActivityNotes: LP in Wamda Capital Fund I, Jungle Ventures Fund III (LPAC member), B Capital Fund II, DCVC Fund VI. $500M+ deployed across VC funds and direct co-investments globally.
directInvestNotes: Direct investments include Freya Biosciences $38M round (2024, women's health biotech), Anomali, Vezeeta, Kitopi, FreshtoHome. CE-Creates arm committed AED 250M ($68M) in 2025 for venture building.

name: Annex Investments
lpActivityNotes: No confirmed LP-in-VC-fund evidence; operates as hybrid venture SFO.
directInvestNotes: Portfolio includes Dukkantek (SME POS, UAE) and Alma Health (digital healthcare). Sector-agnostic with emphasis on transformative tech, sustainability, and impact. Founded by Ahmed Nasser Al Nowais; ~15 yrs experience.

name: The Private Office of Sheikh Saeed bin Ahmed Al Maktoum (Seed Group)
lpActivityNotes: No sub-$100M VC fund LP evidence found.
directInvestNotes: Made 2 confirmed investments per CB Insights: gennius.xyz (seed, May 2023), Fantom Foundation (blockchain, Jan 2019), SmartCargo (Mar 2019). Manages $1.6B+ in investments across tech partnerships in MENA.

name: Majid Al Futtaim Trust
lpActivityNotes: No confirmed LP-in-VC-fund evidence found.
directInvestNotes: Invested in BALY (seed VC, Jan 2022). Investment range typically $0-50M. Sector focus: B2B, consumer, fintech, media. Operates as single family office alongside the larger MAF conglomerate.

name: Al Ghurair Investment
lpActivityNotes: No confirmed LP-in-sub-$100M-VC-fund evidence found.
directInvestNotes: Actively investing in AgriTech startups addressing UAE food security per multiple sources. Single-family office managing patient capital across public and private markets. Founded 1960s.

name: Chalhoub Venture Fund
lpActivityNotes: No confirmed LP evidence found; operates own CVC arm.
directInvestNotes: Invested in Wethenew (Series B, May 2023, luxury sneaker resale) and Willy Chavarria (fashion brand strategic stake). Chalhoub Corporate Ventures and Acquisitions I (2017 vintage fund) has invested in Nafsika Skourti, Pearl Brands, The Modist.

name: Mohamed Alabbar / Alabbar Enterprises
lpActivityNotes: Acquired ~50% stake in MEVP (the VC firm), effectively co-managing MEVF III ($250M) and MEVF IV as a GP-level investor rather than LP.
directInvestNotes: Direct portfolio includes Noon (e-commerce, co-founded with PIF). Through MEVP stake: Kitopi, Vezeeta, and other MENA tech cos are portfolio companies.

name: Al Khor Holding
lpActivityNotes: Anchor LP in Golden Gate Ventures MENA Fund I ($100M, first close May 2024); part of $20M total Qatari family commitment. 60 years of heritage; focused on developing new industries in Qatar.
directInvestNotes: No confirmed direct startup investments found.

name: Al Attiya Group
lpActivityNotes: LP in Golden Gate Ventures MENA Fund I ($100M); part of $20M commitment alongside Al Khor Holding and Sheikh Jassim bin Jabor Al Thani (May 2024). Fund focuses on alternative energy, green tech, B2B AI, fintech, healthtech.
directInvestNotes: No confirmed direct startup investments found.

name: Sheikh Jassim Bin Jabor Al Thani (Private)
lpActivityNotes: Individual LP in Golden Gate Ventures MENA Fund I as part of $20M Qatari family commitment (May 2024). Distinct from QIA (sovereign fund).
directInvestNotes: No confirmed direct startup investments found.

name: Al Faisal Holding
lpActivityNotes: No confirmed LP-in-VC-fund evidence found.
directInvestNotes: Shifting toward tech, healthcare, and energy partnerships aligned with Qatar NV2030; focus on AI, fintech, cloud computing, telecom per CIOO Ali Mahmoudy. Founded 1964 by H.E. Sheikh Faisal Bin Qassim Al Thani.

name: Alzayani Investments (Zayani Venture Capital)
lpActivityNotes: Launched dedicated Zayani Venture Capital arm in 2020/2021. 10 portfolio companies per Tracxn (as of 2023); primary focus is seed-stage MENA/Pakistan startups. Portfolio includes Trukkr and Qureos.
directInvestNotes: No LP-in-VC-fund evidence found; direct-only model.

name: Yusuf Bin Ahmed Kanoo Group
lpActivityNotes: Kanoo Capital manages group investments; investment approach described as 'hybrid direct securities and long-term.' No VC fund LP evidence confirmed.
directInvestNotes: No specific startup or VC direct investments confirmed for 2020-2026 period.

name: NNS Group (Nassef Sawiris Family Office)
lpActivityNotes: No confirmed LP-in-VC-fund evidence; primarily direct investments through NNS.
directInvestNotes: Invested in Solva $20M Series B (Jan 2024) via Sawiris FO entity. NNS Group invests across enterprise, fintech, consumer, digital health globally. Redomiciled to ADGM Abu Dhabi late 2023.

name: Sawiris Family Office (Naguib branch)
lpActivityNotes: No confirmed LP-in-VC-fund evidence.
directInvestNotes: Led seed investment in Nawy (Egyptian PropTech, 7-figure seed, 2021). Portfolio primarily seed-stage Egypt-based startups. Onsi Naguib Sawiris heads the office.

name: Almajdiah Investment Company
lpActivityNotes: Co-anchor of Waad Investment ($200M growth fund, 2024) alongside AlMisfer family. Named lead investor.
directInvestNotes: 9 portfolio companies including Almenu (B2B productivity), Tech Maal (fintech). Latest investment Oct 2024 in Almenu.

name: Alghanim Industries
lpActivityNotes: No confirmed LP-in-VC-fund evidence found.
directInvestNotes: Consumer goods, e-commerce, and logistics startup fund referenced but not publicly named or confirmed. One of Gulf's largest privately-owned conglomerates (~30 business units across 40 countries).

name: KBW Investments
lpActivityNotes: No confirmed VC activity separate from KBW Ventures; conflated in some sources.
directInvestNotes: KBW Investments is the parent entity of KBW Ventures; Riyadh HQ. Distinct from KBW Ventures (Dubai-based CVC).

name: Injaz Capital
lpActivityNotes: No confirmed LP-in-VC-fund evidence.
directInvestNotes: Invested in Xpence (smart business spend platform, Saudi) and MENA Hayah (healthtech). Active deal sourcing for Saudi family offices at early and growth stage.

name: Al Ahly Capital Holding
lpActivityNotes: No VC fund LP evidence. Primarily PE and direct investment arm.
directInvestNotes: Invested EGP 200M in DAWI Clinics (outpatient chain expansion, Apr 2023). Acquired stake in Easy Lease (Apr 2024). PE arm of National Bank of Egypt; founded 2008.

name: Private Office of Sheikh Saeed Al Maktoum
lpActivityNotes: No confirmed LP-in-VC-fund evidence.
directInvestNotes: Estimated net worth ~$38B. Investments range $2M-$5M per ticket via Seed Group subsidiary. Confirmed investments: Fantom Foundation (blockchain, Jan 2019), SmartCargo (logistics, Mar 2019), Servion Global Solutions (digital exp., Jul 2021).

name: Al Nowais Investments
lpActivityNotes: No confirmed LP-in-VC-fund evidence.
directInvestNotes: UAE-based holding company (est. 1979); renewable energy, healthcare, and tech focus aligned with food security and climate. Invests in MENA tech startups. Sheikha Amal Al Nowais invested in Inventure Metal Industries Dec 2023.

name: Waha Capital
family: Al Qubaisi (publicly listed; Abu Dhabi anchor)
lpActivityNotes: No sub-$100M VC fund LP evidence found; manages own fund strategies.
directInvestNotes: 26 investments total; latest direct investment in Conpal (network management software, Germany) Mar 2023. Mubadala is anchor shareholder; listed on ADX. Asset classes include fintech and healthcare alongside PE.
